opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $52 cover hid 3 years of pet hair and wine stains in 5 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained, fur-covered couch that guests notice immediately when they walk in
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, uniform sofa that looks freshly purchased — no visible pet hair, stains, or wear
opportunities.why_now: Memorial Day weekend drives peak furniture-adjacent shopping and spring cleaning guilt pushes pet owners to finally solve the couch problem before summer guests arrive.

opportunities.specific_product: clear stackable pantry bins with labels set (12-piece)
opportunities.transformation_hook: I spent $38 and finally fixed my chaotic pantry in one afternoon
opportunities.before_state: Overcrowded pantry with mismatched boxes, fallen bags, and no visible system — can't find anything
opportunities.after_state: Uniform clear bins, labeled by category, everything visible and reachable — looks like a Pinterest board
opportunities.why_now: Post-spring-cleaning momentum in late May keeps organization content at peak engagement as people tackle the last remaining problem areas in their homes.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 3-piece patio bistro set with cushions
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $189 set turned my dead backyard into a place I actually want to sit
opportunities.before_state: Empty or cluttered patio/backyard with no seating — space completely unused and ignored
opportunities.after_state: Styled outdoor seating nook with matching cushioned chairs and table — functional and photo-ready for summer
opportunities.why_now: Memorial Day weekend is the single biggest outdoor furniture shopping moment of the year — buyers are actively purchasing right now for summer use.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Swapped my dull $10 knives for this $59 set and actually enjoy cooking now
opportunities.before_state: Mismatched dull knives scattered in a drawer — prep takes twice as long and nothing cuts cleanly
opportunities.after_state: Organized knife block on the counter with razor-sharp professional blades — kitchen looks and functions like a chef's space
buyer_intent_keywords: best knife set for home cook
opportunities.why_now: Summer grilling and entertaining season spikes home cooking interest in late May, making kitchen upgrade content peak in both reach and conversion.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm original side sleeper pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: I woke up without neck pain for the first time in years after one night with this $94 pillow
opportunities.before_state: Flat, unsupportive pillow causing morning neck stiffness, poor sleep, and waking up exhausted
opportunities.after_state: Ergonomic U-shaped cutout pillow aligned to shoulder — deep sleep, no neck pain, waking up refreshed
buyer_intent_keywords: best pillow for side sleepers neck pain
pillow for shoulder pain side sleeper
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content maintains year-round virality and the 20% commission plus a specific, quantifiable pain point (neck pain) makes testimonial-format Reels highly convertible.
